references.source: Government of Canada Open Government (canonical publication)
references.note: Canonical publication of the Open Government Licence - Canada 2.0 by the Government of Canada.

approvals.note: Not OSI-approved. OGL-Canada is a government data/information licence and is not listed on OSI's approved-licenses page; its subject matter (Government of Canada copyright material) falls outside OSI's open-source software definition.
Government data license not classified by FSF. OGL-Canada 2.0 does not appear on the FSF license list as of retrieved_at.
